changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO answer_weights (id, value, name, description) VALUES (1, 0, 'Not Answered', 'Not Applicable') , (2, 2, 'Optimized answer', 'The most mature choice on the questionnaire.') , (3, 4, 'Quantitively managed answer', 'The 2nd most mature answer.') , (4, 6, 'Defined answer', 'The 3rd most mature answer.') , (5, 8, 'Managed answer', 'The 4th most mature answer.') , (6, 10, 'Initial answer', 'The least mature choice on the questionnaire.') ;
ALTER SEQUENCE answer_weights_id_seq RESTART WITH 7;
